commands: if [ -f package.json ]; then npm install --no-audit --no-fund; elif [ -f backend/package.json ]; then cd backend && npm install --no-audit --no-fund; else echo 'package.json not found' && exit 1; fi

if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then python -m pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt; elif [ -f backend/requirements.txt ]; then python -m pip install --no-cache-dir -r backend/requirements.txt; else echo 'requirements.txt not found' && exit 1; fi

deploy.startCommand: if [ -f package.json ]; then npm start; elif [ -f backend/package.json ]; then cd backend && npm start; else echo 'package.json not found' && exit 1; fi
